label: Layout recipes
summary: Page-shape recipes via grid areas: sidebars, holy grail, portal thirds. Single column below svga.
era: Nested table layouts: nav column left, content right, banner on top, rebuilt as grid, no tables harmed.

classes.name: rs-layout--holy-grail
classes.role: recipe: header / nav main rail / footer

classes.name: rs-layout--three-col
classes.role: recipe: the portal look, three honest thirds

a11y: Source order stays header, main, nav, rail, footer, readers first; the grid rearranges visually from svga up. Use real landmark elements for the areas.
